title: Thai Eggplant Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry made with eggplant, Thai red curry paste, and your choice of protein. Serve with steamed rice.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, until softened.
Add shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes, until pink and cooked through.
Add eggplant and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Stir in fish sauce, soy sauce, and brown sugar.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Garnish with cilantro and serve over steamed rice.
